---
title: "Mary R. Pridham"
---

## Mary R. Pridham

**Dates:** (b. 1849/50)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1891)

### Biography

A Gosling as ‘Hedgerose’ from c. 1865, living then at 6 Trevor Terrace Rutland Gate, she was born Mauritius, daughter of John Pridham, schoolmaster; she was first cousin of Christabel Coleridge and Katherine Helmore.  Her mother remarried William Martyn MRCS (1815-96);  in 1881 she was living 63 Harcourt Terrace in the household of Thomas Leon Wilkinson, perhaps as a governess, in 1891 with her stepfather and mother at Westmoreland Lodge, Inner Park Rd. Wandsworth [1871, 1881 census; Plarr, <i>Lives of FRCS</i>; Hainton, <i>The Unknown Coleridge</i>; the <i>Plymouth Herald</i> (7 April 1838) records the death of John Drake Pridham (1777/8-1838), of the firm of Harris Rosdew and Co, bankers of this town;  he  was father of John Pridham, Mrs Helmore and Mrs Derwent Coleridge]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
